    "Inadequate bracing and kickers to withstand lateral concrete pour pressure",
    "Risk of formwork blowout, structural failure, and worker injury during concrete placement"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop the active formwork build and suspend any scheduled concrete pours",
    "Install additional bracing, kickers, and ties in accordance with the engineered formwork design",
    "Obtain a formal sign-off from a qualified inspector or structural engineer prior to pouring"
  ],
  "rationale": "The formwork bracing is inadequate to resist the lateral pressures calculated under ACI 347. Because the work is actively in progress and a blowout during a pour poses a severe safety risk to workers and structural integrity, the work fails inspection and must be remediated immediately.",

    "ACI 347 (Guide to Formwork for Concrete)"
